lmlp.gui.recipe_detail.title: Recipe Details
lmlp.label.recipe.none: Base material or directly obtainable block; no crafting breakdown is needed.
lmlp.label.recipe.header: Recipe %d: produces x%d per craft, craft %d times
lmlp.label.recipe.any.soul_sand_soil: Any soul sand or soul soil
lmlp.tooltip.recipe.transfer_missing: Click: move the recipe ingredients needed for missing crafts
lmlp.tooltip.recipe.transfer_all: Shift+Click: move all possible recipe ingredients
error.rei.not.supported.move.items: Move Items is not supported with this recipe and this container.
lmlp.gui.minimal_sources.title: Source Material Details
lmlp.gui.confirm.offline_cache_not_found: Confirm that you reached %s at %s and did not find the expected schematic placement?
and did not find the expected schematic placement?
lmlp.gui.button.hover.material_list.open: Open the Litematica Material List Plus config screen.
lmlp.gui.button.hover.material_list.pref: Create a new schematic copy using material preferences.
lmlp.gui.preferred_replacement.title: Preferred Material Replacement
lmlp.gui.confirm.apply_preferred_schemat: The new schematic has been saved. Use it in place of the currently displayed schematic?
The new schematic has been saved.
Use it in place of the currently displayed schematic?
All placement settings will be preserved; the original will only be hidden, not deleted.
lmlp.message.preferred_schematic_applied: The preferred schematic is now active and the original placement is hidden.
lmlp.error.preferred_schematic_apply_fai: The preferred schematic could not be applied; the original placement was left unchanged.
lmlp.gui.preferred_replacement.config_on: Set material preferences here. Open this form from a material list to see exact replacements.
lmlp.gui.preferred_replacement.none: This schematic has no blocks that need replacing for the expanded preferences.
lmlp.gui.preferred_replacement.missing_s: No matching shape in target family
lmlp.error.preferred_replacement.no_sche: The current material list has no editable loaded schematic.
lmlp.error.preferred_replacement.file_ex: The file %s already exists. Hold Shift while clicking Save to overwrite this copy.
lmlp.error.preferred_replacement.source_: The source schematic used for this replacement cannot be overwritten: %s
lmlp.error.preferred_replacement.save_fa: Could not save the new schematic file: %s
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_wood_enabl: Whether wood-family replacement is enabled in Replace with preferences.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_wood_famil: Target wood used when Replace with preferences creates a schematic copy.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_stone_enab: Whether full stone-family replacement is enabled in Replace with preferences.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_stone_fami: Preserves product role and block shape when possible; click a detail target to choose a same-shape substitute.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_glass_enab: Whether glass replacement is enabled in Replace with preferences.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_glass_mate: The target glass preserves whether each source is a full block or a pane.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_wool_enabl: Whether wool color replacement is enabled in Replace with preferences.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_wool_mater: Target wool color used when Replace with preferences creates a schematic copy.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_carpet_ena: Whether carpet color replacement is enabled in Replace with preferences.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_carpet_mat: Target carpet used when Replace with preferences creates a schematic copy.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_terracotta: Whether terracotta replacement is enabled in Replace with preferences.
Target terracotta used when Replace with preferences creates a schematic copy.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_glazed_ter: Whether glazed terracotta replacement is enabled in Replace with preferences.
Only replaces other glazed terracotta and preserves its facing.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_concrete_e: Whether concrete color replacement is enabled in Replace with preferences.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_concrete_m: Only replaces concrete of another color.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_concrete_p: Whether concrete-powder color replacement is enabled in Replace with preferences.
Only replaces concrete powder and never converts it to concrete.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_bed_enable: Whether bed color replacement is enabled in Replace with preferences.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_bed_materi: Changes color while preserving facing, head or foot, and occupied state.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_candle_ena: Whether candle replacement is enabled in Replace with preferences.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_candle_mat: Changes color while preserving candle count, lit state, and waterlogging.
lmlp.config.comment.preferred_shulker_bo: Whether shulker-box replacement is enabled in Replace with preferences.
Changes color while preserving facing, name, items, and all block-entity data.
lmlp.gui.material_list.chunk_missing_sta: Current material list is loaded from schematic cache
lmlp.gui.known_placement.status.live_hin: The placement chunks are loaded, so the material list can use live world counting.
lmlp.gui.known_placement.status.cache_hi: The material list will read from schematic/cache data instead of starting a live world scan.
lmlp.gui.known_placement.status.chunk_ca: The placement is in the current dimension, but its chunks are not fully loaded. The material list reads schematic/cache data.
lmlp.gui.known_placement.status.dimensio: The placement belongs to another dimension. The material list reads schematic/cache data and cannot scan the current world.
lmlp.gui.known_placement.status.offline_: This entry is restored from the saved LMLP cache index and only reads saved material cache.
lmlp.gui.known_placement.cache_only_hint: Different dimension: material list uses schematic cache only.
lmlp.gui.known_placement.offline_cache_h:
Restored from the saved LMLP cache index.
The real placement is not loaded in this dimension.
lmlp.gui.known_placement.offline_cache_d: Deleting this entry only removes the LMLP cache record.
lmlp.gui.known_placement.offline_cache_e: No saved material entries are available for this cache record.
lmlp.gui.known_placement.schematic_missi: The schematic file is missing; live refresh is disabled.
lmlp.gui.known_placement.origin_highligh: Click to highlight this placement origin and add a beam.
lmlp.gui.known_placement.origin_wrong_di: Placement origins in other dimensions cannot be highlighted.
lmlp.message.known_placement_removed_ret: Removed LMLP known entry only. Return to that dimension to delete the actual placement.
lmlp.message.known_placement_context_mis: This entry is not in the current cache index, so its material list cannot be opened.
lmlp.message.known_placement_no_material: This entry has no available material cache. Load it in its dimension once or refresh its cache.
lmlp.message.offline_cache_missing: This offline cache has no saved material list entries.
lmlp.message.offline_cache_removed: Removed the LMLP offline cache record only.
lmlp.message.cache_cleared: Cleared this placement's LMLP cache records. The real placement was not deleted.
lmlp.message.origin_marker_highlight_add: Highlighted placement origin and added beam.
lmlp.message.origin_marker_origin_missin: This placement does not have a valid origin coordinate.
lmlp.config.comment.disable_litematica_h: When enabled, no material hover tooltip is shown. Turn this off to use Litematica's original hover tooltip.
lmlp.config.comment.count_display_style:
Style 1: boxes + stacks + items
Style 2: total = boxes + stacks + items
Style 3: A × SB + B × 64 (16) + C
Style 4: total (Litematica)
lmlp.config.comment.origin_marker_time: Seconds before the placement origin highlight and beam expire after clicking an origin.
lmlp.config.comment.origin_marker_text_s: Text scale for the placement origin marker label. 1 is smallest, 5 is largest.
lmlp.config.comment.missing_placement_bu: How close (in blocks) the player must be to an offline-cached placement's recorded origin for the "I can't find it" button to appear on that row.
lmlp.config.comment.hover_panel_max_rows: Maximum item rows per column in choice-group hover panels. Extra items flow into additional columns as screen width allows.
lmlp.config.comment.open_config_gui: Open the Litematica Material List Plus configuration screen.
lmlp.config.comment.clear_origin_marker: Clear the active placement origin highlight and beam.
lmlp.config.comment.recipe_stop_items: Items in this list are treated as base materials. Use {color} to match all 16 Minecraft colors, for example minecraft:{color}_wool.
lmlp.config.comment.keep_as_leaf_items: Materials in this list are kept as their own counted row instead of being decomposed into raw materials. Use {color}/{wood} wildcards, for example minecraft:{wood}_slab.
config.comment.disablelitematicahovertoo: When enabled, no material hover tooltip is shown. Turn this off to use Litematica's original hover tooltip.
config.comment.countdisplaystyle:
Style 1: boxes + stacks + items
Style 2: total = boxes + stacks + items
Style 3: A × SB + B × 64 (16) + C
Style 4: total (Litematica)
config.comment.originmarkertime: Seconds before the placement origin highlight and beam expire after clicking an origin.
config.comment.originmarkertextscale: Text scale for the placement origin marker label. 1 is smallest, 5 is largest.
config.comment.missingplacementbuttonran: How close (in blocks) the player must be to an offline-cached placement's recorded origin for the "I can't find it" button to appear on that row.
config.comment.hoverpanelmaxrows: Maximum item rows per column in choice-group hover panels. Extra items flow into additional columns as screen width allows.
config.comment.openconfiggui: Open the Litematica Material List Plus configuration screen.
config.comment.clearoriginmarker: Clear the active placement origin highlight and beam.
config.comment.recipestopitems: Items in this list are treated as base materials and won't be broken down further.
config.comment.keepasleafitems: Materials in this list are shown as their own single row instead of being broken down further.
lmlp.gui.tooltip.wildcards.title: Wildcards supported
lmlp.config.comment.replace_water_bucket: When enabled, water buckets required by the material list are shown and counted as ice instead, one ice per bucket.
config.comment.replacewaterbucketwithice: When enabled, water buckets required by the material list are shown and counted as ice instead, one ice per bucket.
lmlp.gui.item_id_picker.title: JEI item selector
lmlp.gui.item_id_picker.sort_mode.name: Name A-Z
